explanatory_text: A quarterly growth estimate based on source releases available before the official estimate.

faq.answer: No. It is an automated nowcast intended for monitoring and development use.
faq.question: Is this an official forecast?

faq.answer: Updated when major activity releases arrive
faq.question: When does it update?

methodology: Experimental data-backed tracker using existing RBA money, short-rate, and commodity-price series. It is a transparent activity proxy until an Australia-specific GDP bridge model is added.
update_cadence_label: Updated when major activity releases arrive
